iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 44% (stable). Day 24 Hour 15 UTC. CRITICAL. Trump claims 'regime change' underway. Diplomacy contested (Iran denies). No nuclear-specific events. IAEA sidelined. Updated 2026-03-23T15:05:37Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 24 Hour 15 UTC. IMMINENT. Trump claims 'regime change' underway, 'very good' Iran talks (Witkoff/Kushner). Iran denies. Tasnim: Hormuz won't return to pre-war. Saudi allows US base use vs Iran. Kharg Island ground ops considered. Iran cluster bomb in central Israel. Hezbollah rockets hit Kiryat Shmona. Oil down 9.8%. latest_news.headline: Starmer-Trump discuss need to open Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: UK PM Starmer and Trump discuss need to reopen Strait of Hormuz. UK-EU-Gulf joint statement on 'appropriate efforts' for safe passage.

latest_news.headline: Gulf states UAE/Bahrain join Hormuz coalition statement with EU
latest_news.text: UAE Foreign Minister: 'we will never be blackmailed by terrorists.' UAE and Bahrain sign joint statement with European leaders expressing readiness to contribute to Hormuz reopening efforts. Gulf aligning firmly with US.

latest_news.headline: Israel warns 'several more weeks' of fighting against Iran
latest_news.text: IDF says preparing for 'several more weeks of fighting against Iran and Hezbollah' — open-ended war commitment.

latest_news.headline: FTSE drops 2% to 9,706 — lowest since December
latest_news.text: FTSE 100 down over 2% to 9,706. European markets following Asian rout. DAX, CAC also down ~2%.

latest_news.headline: Oman FM: US has 'lost control of its foreign policy'
latest_news.text: Oman FM writes in Economist that US has 'lost control of its foreign policy' — urges all parties back to negotiating table. Oman lone regional mediator critical of US.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 76% (stable). Day 24 Hour 15 UTC. IMMINENT. Hezbollah rockets hit Kiryat Shmona (bus hit, 2 injured). 7 IDF soldiers wounded in Lebanon. Israeli civilian killed by own artillery. Qasmiya Bridge destroyed. Ground expansion continues. Updated 2026-03-23T15:05:37Z

latest_news.headline: IDF approves expansion of ground+air attacks - 2nd division deployed
latest_news.text: IDF approves expansion of ground and air attacks against Hezbollah. Second division deployed to southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Lebanese PM: IRGC officers commanding Hezbollah operations
latest_news.text: Lebanese PM Salam says IRGC members are commanding Hezbollah operations in ongoing war against Israel.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge - key Litani River crossing
latest_news.text: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge, key Litani River crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 39% (stable). Day 24 Hour 15 UTC. CRITICAL. Spring-summer offensive grinding. 8000+ weekly Russian losses. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Oil revenue boost for Russia. Updated 2026-03-23T15:05:37Z

latest_news.headline: CNN confirms: Russian forces begin spring-summer 2026 offensive
latest_news.text: CNN: Russia begins anticipated spring-summer offensive against Ukrainian Fortress Belt. Syrskyi: 'stepped up pressure across several sections of the front.' Sloviansk/Kramatorsk directions.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 45% (up). Day 24 Hour 15 UTC. CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire expires midnight Mar 24 (tonight). No extension. Pakistan FM vows 'eradicate terrorism.' Post-ceasefire escalation near-certain. Updated 2026-03-23T15:05:37Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan FM vows to 'eradicate terrorism' as Afghan ceasefire nears end
latest_news.text: Pakistan FM says committed to 'eradicate the menace of terrorism' as Eid ceasefire expires midnight March 24. No extension signal. Post-ceasefire escalation near-certain.

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of mortar fire during Eid ceasefire - 1 killed. ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Fraying badly.

top_signals: TRUMP REGIME CHANGE CLAIM: Says regime change 'effectively underway' in Iran, blames killed officials
DIPLOMACY ACTIVE: Trump claims 'very good' talks, 'major points of agreement' - Witkoff/Kushner channel
IRAN DENIES: Tasnim says Hormuz 'won't return to pre-war conditions,' no negotiations underway
SAUDI POLICY SHIFT: Saudi Arabia now allows US military to use bases against Iran
KHARG ISLAND: US considering ground operation to seize Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports)
IRAN CLUSTER BOMB: Fragments hit central Israel (Petah Tikva) - no casualties reported
HEZBOLLAH ROCKETS: 4 rockets hit Kiryat Shmona, bus hit, 2 injured
IRAN THREATENS FULL HORMUZ: Warns 'complete and total closure' if power plants damaged
IRAN SCALES BACK SAUDI: Reducing strikes on Saudi Arabia amid escalation concerns
PAKISTAN CEASEFARE: Expires midnight tonight Mar 24 - no extension, escalation near-certain
OIL DROP: Brent down 9.8%, Wall Street surges on diplomacy hopes
IEA WARNING: Global economy faces 'major, major threat' - worst since 1970s oil shocks

new: TRUMP-IRAN DIPLOMACY: 'Productive conversations' — first direct talks since war began
TRUMP POSTPONES STRIKES: 5-day delay on power plant strikes, subject to talks success
IRAN CLAIMS TRUMP 'BACKED DOWN' — diplomatic spin to claim leverage
ISRAEL-LEBANON: Hezbollah record 63 operations, ground campaign expanding
RUSSIA-UKRAINE: 8,000+ Russian losses this week per Zelensky — offensive grinding
zone_changes: iran_conventional: IMMINENT -> CRITICAL (downgrade — ultimatum replaced by 5-day talks window)
iran_conventional: iran_rejects_dialogue signal should be deprecated in favor of diplomacy_active
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: PARTIAL DE-ESCALATION: Trump delays power plant strikes 5 days for talks. First diplomatic channel with Tehran. However, fighting continues on all fronts. Hormuz still blocked. 5-day window is fragile.

latest_news.headline: Trump claims 'regime change' underway in Iran
latest_news.text: Trump says regime change 'effectively underway' - killed officials means 'there's automatically a regime change.' Warns if talks fail: 'we'll just keep bombing our little hearts out.'

latest_news.headline: Trump: 'Very good' Iran talks, 'major points of agreement' - Witkoff/Kushner
latest_news.text: Trump says US-Iran had 'very good and productive conversations' on 'complete and total resolution.' Envoy Witkoff and Kushner held talks. 5-day postponement of power plant strikes.

latest_news.headline: Iran denies talks: Tasnim says Hormuz 'won't return to pre-war'
latest_news.text: Iran's Tasnim agency: Hormuz will not return to pre-war conditions, energy markets will remain unsettled, no negotiations underway with US. Direct contradiction of Trump claims.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia allows US to use bases against Iran - major policy shift
latest_news.text: Saudi Arabia shifts policy, now allows US military to use Saudi bases for operations against Iran. Previously denied. Significant escalation of Gulf alignment with US war effort.

latest_news.headline: US considering ground operation to seize Iran's Kharg Island
latest_news.text: US considers ground operation to seize Kharg Island - handles 90% of Iran oil exports. Marines and Navy personnel deployment accelerated to Middle East.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah rockets hit Kiryat Shmona, bus hit, 2 injured
latest_news.text: Hezbollah fires 4 rockets at Kiryat Shmona in northern Israel. One hits a bus, injuring 2 people. Continued cross-border attacks.

latest_news.headline: Iran cluster bomb fragments hit central Israel (Petah Tikva)
latest_news.text: Iranian cluster munition fragments found in Petah Tikva area (central Israel). No casualties. Fire and rescue dispatched. Continued Iranian strikes on Israeli territory.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 15:04 UTC). DIPLOMACY WINDOW: Trump claims 'major points of agreement' with Iran, 5-day postponement on power plant strikes. But Iran DENIES talks exist. Contradictory signals. Saudi allows US base use vs Iran. Kharg Island ground ops considered. Hezbollah rockets hit Kiryat Shmona. Iran cluster bomb fragments in central Israel. Pakistan ceasefire expires TONIGHT. IEA warns worst energy crisis since 1970s.
de_escalation_watch: FRAGILE: Trump claims productive Iran talks, 5-day diplomacy window. But Iran flatly denies negotiations. Meanwhile: Saudi policy shift to allow US base access, Kharg Island ground ops considered, fighting continues on all fronts. Market rally on hope, but military operations ACCELERATING. Watch for Iran counter-narrative.
